mcoop_controller_fix.title: MCoop Controller Fix
mcoop_controller_fix.description: The MCoop controller was experiencing issues with site name case handling and inconsistent routing. The site name was being stored as "MCOOP" (all uppercase) in the session, but the controller name is "MCoop" (mixed case). This inconsistency caused problems with theme handling and routing.
